title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
